title: Flaky Kenyan Cheese Crumble
description: A fresh and flaky indulgent dish featuring cheese slices that are baked to perfection on the tandoor. High-protein-friendly and a perfect snack option.

ingredients.name: 6 to 8 small garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: minced and added to cheese mixture

instructions: Preheat your tandoor or oven to 275°F (135°C).
In a bowl, mix together the shredded cheese, salt, pepper, and minced garlic.
Gently shape the cheese into small patties, about 1-inch in diameter.
Place the cheese slices on a lined baking sheet. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Serve warm as an indulgent snack.
